title: Supply Chain Manager - Volkswagen India Logistics - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Volkswagen India Logistics - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Volkswagen India Logistics family as a Supply Chain Manager in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Volkswagen India Logistics:
Volkswagen India Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Volkswagen India Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
